title: phlox multiflora subsp. multiflora
intro: Phlox multiflora subsp. multiflora, also known as Korean phlox or fragrant phlox, is a flowering plant species within the genus Phlox. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and improving immune function. Herbal preparations of Phlox multiflora subsp. multiflora include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
